form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (20.10) at Angle Park in a Grade 6, finishing fourth and beaten 2.25 lengths. Has three successes and three minors from eight starts from box 1. Key chance and should go close.

form.formComment: Could only manage fifth last time but the start prior hit the frame when second (23.19) over 400m at this track. Draws an inside box and can measure up.

form.formComment: Recent form has been ordinary and he is facing a tougher line up. Not going well enough to consider.

form.formComment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and drifts back in her races. The latest effort was a 7 length sixth over 342m at Angle Park. Safely held last time and looking to others.
